entry.title: How to use tag in FormattedText or FeedlistItem
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am using FeedListItem to display the different types of content like Texts(<p>),Links(<a>) and Blob images(<img>). 

Sometimes I get an image with text .

For some reason I see control is not even accepting  <img> tag as part of text property .

JS code

'<img alt=\"image\" width=\"302.1186440677966\" height=\"250\" src=\"' +
										imgURL + '\">'

Any recommendations or alternatives ?

Thanks,

Abhinay

entry.title: Re: AR Credit Memo cancellation_Don't increase quantity.
entry.content:
Hello, 
if you want to see it in specific reports you can enable this in the document settings of B1. 


You can check in this help page of sap, which reports are affected. 

Reporting for Canceled and Cancellation Documents | SAP Help Portal

Kind Regards

entry.title: Export is not supported in SAC optimized design mode
entry.content:
Hi,

I see export option is disabled in the SAC Story's optimized design mode. Please share if any work around to extract PDF version of it.

Thanks, Siva

entry.title: Re: Export is not supported in SAC optimized design mode
entry.content: It is available in the View Mode but not in the Edit Mode.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
Communication Management is missing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition Trial. 

Is this not supported in the SAP S/4HANA trial account ?

entry.title: Logging solution for SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello there, 

As some others out here we've been missing on the good ol' 'Debugger' to help us out while figuring out issues with our logic or application behavior. This becomes extremely challenging when working on a native application as there is no 'browser debug tools' for that use case that would help us understand our app a little better. 

As of recently we have been exploring several monitoring tools and there is a relatively new player in the field, namely ncScale (ncScale.com) . They have a very seamless integration with Xano, but also have a pretty easy way of pushing logs from other custom sources. Which led me to create a simple setup that would allow me to send logs from an application that I'm building with SAP Build Apps to a nice UI where one can also set up Slack notifications (if that's something one would want). There are multiple ways of doing this, so I'll try to explore some of those, but first the default, must-do-steps: 

1. Create an account on app.ncScale.io and set up a custom integration. For more detailed guide on these steps I advise reading their documentation: ncScale create account and ncScale create custom integration.

2. Remember to keep the 'token' in a safe place as that is only shown to you once. 

You have everything set up for ncScale to be able to receive your logs, let's now explore how can those logs be pushed from Build Apps (Preview or live built application) to ncScale:

Option 1. - HTTP request: 

Step 1. Install the 'HTTP request' logic flow from the marketplace and drag it onto your logic canvas to the desired location. 

Step 2. Fill out the request information based on ncScale documentation: 

And for the reference the Request body: 
```
{token: 'your-nc-scale-token', event_name: 'Your event name', severity: 'Info', message: 'I\'m a log from SAP Build Apps', createdAt: TIMESTAMP(), extra: null}
```

This will send a basic log to ncScale when this HTTP request is triggered in your logic canvas, let it be a button tap, or a failed data resource flow output. 

Option 2. Using custom javascript that is then wrapped into a custom flow function 
*This is advised and suggested if you expect yourself adding the logging functionality to several of your pages and pieces of logic.

Step 1. Drag a 'Javascript' node that is on the 'Core' tab in the logic canvas. 

Step 2. Write the logic and the inputs for the javascript: 

```
const inputData = inputs;
let data = JSON.stringify({
   "createdAt": Date.now(),
   "event_name": inputData.eventInfo.eventName,
   "extra": inputData.extra,
   "message": inputData.eventInfo.message,
   "severity": inputData.eventInfo.severity,
   "token": inputData.ncScaleToken
});

let config = {
   method: 'post',
   headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json'
   },
  body: data
};

return fetch('https://logs.ncscale.io/v1/logs', config)
   .then(response => response.json())
      .then(data => {
         return [0, { result: data }];
      })
   .catch((error) => {
      return [1, { error: error }];
   });
```
Step 3. Turn it into a custom flow function and setting up the inputs: 

First select your javascript and turn it into a flow function (Number 1 on image), then open the 'Edit properties' (Number 2 on image) and add your inputs. Here are my inputs as for reference:

Step 4. Bind your input values in the custom flow: 

 

The major advantage of this setup is that now we can send debugging or error logging notifications to a monitoring platform even for the native applications. This can allow us a more detailed logging of user interaction or behavior. I would not want to store information sent as logs for a longer period this is why this solution seems to me superior against logging errors to a database table or a Firestore collection or any other solution out there. 

As the final step and wrap up to this little guide here is how it looks when those logs arrive to ncScale dashboard: 

I hope this might help some of you in developing applications that are more stable, less buggy and can allow you to get notified if something goes wrong in a production application. 

To read about how to set up Slack notifications you can follow here: ncScale to Slack.

PS. I'm not affiliated in any ways to ncScale, this guide is here purely due to the positive effects it can bring to developing either simple or complex applications with SAP Build Apps.

entry.title: Re: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi,

yes, it should be possible. In the TN you can verify if the newly added item is active and if the user is allowed to do it. If not, the system can throw an error. 

 

Kind Regards

entry.title: Cloud ALM - can't change actual completion date
entry.content: When I set a task to Done in Cloud ALM, it sets the actual completion date to the date I set it to Done. I need to be able to change the actual completion date to the date the task completed (in this case 3 days ago). Any suggestions, as I can't find a way to edit this field?

entry.title: Re: Production order SAP Business One
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites if it's a question about some SAP software! Instead, you may use Technology Q&A and use the tag corresponding to the SAP software.

entry.title: Configuration and Security Analysis in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Introduction:

Configuration and Security Analysis application helps us display the configuration items of the technical configuration using the store browser.

Changes you can display the evaluated changes on items in time frames. Administration provides information about the managed systems and their status in CSA.

The capabilities are available after the setup of ABAP on-premise systems. CSA detects and records common technical changes in a managed system. A change tracking is performed during upload of the extracted configuration information.

On managed system side the configuration data is collected and pushed to the SAP Cloud ALM for operation. There the data is compared with the previous snapshot to identify changes. Data is stored in the HANA database.

 

Config Stores of SAP On Premise Solutions

This section provides a list of Config Stores that are available for managed systems of type Application Server ABAP:

  • SAP Business Suite
  • SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP (7.40 and higher)
  • SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP S/4HANA, private cloud edition

 

Conclusion:

CSA is a new and very useful feature in SAP Cloud ALM Operations track and can be a game changer if utilized properly. It is very easy to setup and data starts showing up once you set up SAP Cloud ALM for operations of your landscape.

Keep Learning and keep sharing !

entry.title: SuccessFactors and Active Directory Integration
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are in the very beginning of integrating SuccessFactors and Active Directory, and I need some clarity on a few things. Hope someone can help. 

1. As I've seen in previous projects, it is not before the employee is hired in EC and sent to AD, that the username and business email address is generated.

So how is the username normally created in AD (and sent back to SF)? Is the username created based on attributes such as first name and last name in SuccessFactors? 

2. If an employee change last name, would we expect the email address to change automatically? Meaning, change is triggered from SF to AD and back to SF? I would believe no, because of lisences? But if a change must be done, would we then do the email adress change directly in AD?

I guess what I am really after, is some general information on how username and business email process would look like with SF-AD provisioning enabled.

All answers appreciated.

Thanks!

Br,

Ines

entry.title: Shipping to Vendor for repair and return
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we send the material to vendor for repair and return.

Currently i am using ZLO(Offline process) which does not show equipment movement in SAP and the status shows the equipment still at my plant whereas i have moved it to vendor for repair. Upon receipt of the physical equipment back to my plant, we are performing stock return process in SAP and bringing the equipment to inventory stock.

I am looking for brief transaction movement or process to move the equipment to vendor in SAP, and later need to receive it in my plant's active stock upon physical receipt from the vendor.

Couple of questions (Raised by expert):

  1. Is your Equipment also mapped to Serial Number # ? 
  2. Have you explored standard Refurbishment process means -- Order (bring serial to inventory using 262)-->Sub Con PR-- Subcon PO--Transfer Posting 541O (Ship to Vendor) tracking available in MBLB--then receive 101 back to inventory 

point 2 needs split valuation if your org do not have split valuation --you can still explore Subcon process with serial numbers --

Response for above question raised by the expert:

Yes my equipment is serialized component. Can you please elaborate the steps required as i am bit confused. Regular Purchase Requisition created against the local job order(work order) but without material number--> Regular PO  created through the same PR --> 541 movement in MIGO to ship to vendor --> Shipping the physical component to vendor through ZLO-DT/Shipment --> Receiving the physical unit back from the vendor --> Perform GR(using MB1B-101) for the PO(initially created without material number). Then the serial number will reflect in my stock location (OR) do i need to perform separate movement to bring the unit in to my stock? Please correct me if i am wrong.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Merit Guideline Field Reportability
entry.content:
Is there a way to make the Merit Guideline field reportable?  We have a need to report on this field but it seems this standard field doesn't have the option to set it as reportable.

Thanks in advance for any help you can provide!

entry.title: Third Party Logistics with SAP books
entry.content: Please suggest books for Third Party Logistics with SAP.

entry.title: SAP PI - REST Receiver PDF Content application/octet-stream
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working on a SAP PI interface (synchronous) :
[ABAP Proxy] >>> [SAP PI 7.5] >>> [REST API (REST Adapter)]

I consume a REST API to retrieve a PDF file.
Receiver URL is something like this : https://my-url-api/api/v1/document/{key}/content

The request process is fine, no problem with this part.

The API response is directly the content of the PDF file (application/octet-stream)

Currently I can't retrieve the PDF into my backend ABAP System (ABAP Proxy). 

On my REST communication channel settings I use (Data Format Response):
Data Format : "Binary"
Assign binary message as : "Main Payload of XI Message"
If I use "Attachment to XI Message (No main Payload)", I'm encountering an error like "Logging message failed, due to Failed to log msg" and nothing relevant on PI logs ...

With JSon or XML for Response Data Format It's always the same error : Response does not have the expected format.

With "Main Payload of XI Message", I have this error "Content is not allowed in prolog" or "Content is not allowed in trailing section". 

I also tried without operation mapping on my ICO : In this case no error on SAP PI, and on SXMB_MONI It's also OK, but an error occur on ABAP Code : Error during XML => ABAP conversion: Response Message.
On SXMB_MONI I can open the PDF file via double-click on the Payload.
So I think this is the right way to go... but not sure > How to retrieve correctly the PDF on my ABAP code ?

I also tried some tricks with Error Handling and {http_result}, but always the same problem, PDF content is not allowed on XML tag.

Using Support Attachments on my Communication Channel doesn't change nothing.

If anyone has a solution, I'd love to hear it.

Regards,
Youri

entry.title: Re: Multiple Input parameter in Hana Calculation graphical view
entry.content:
@leandrong 

Hi,

not sure that I can answer your question.

But in case the underlying field is from type VARCHAR, you can add a default value * like I did here for p_gender and p_name .

As a result of this, you do not have to provide a value for both parameters.

Selection:

Result:

Hope this answers your question.

entry.title: Re: How to update the vendor country specific enhancement in company code for vendor role in BP tcod
entry.content: The more details you give, the more quickly you will be helped... I feel one sentence is too short to get a quick and precise solution...

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content:
---------------- Node-Js  ---------
const { CloudEvent, HTTP } = require("cloudevents");
const axios = require('axios');
const dotenv = require('dotenv');

// Load the environment variables from the .env file
dotenv.config();

const {SolaceProtocol, SolaceHost, SolacePort, SolaceUsername, SolacePassword, SapCommunityId, SolaceTopic} = process.env;
const ce = new CloudEvent(
    {
        "type": "sap-business-One-fake",
        "specversion": "1.0",
        "source": "/default/sap.s4.beh/244572008",
        "id": "63d6a150-c6a1-4c5b-bcc3-27d90c07941c",
        "time": "2024-02-26T10:53:06Z",
        "datacontenttype": "application/json",
        "data": {
            "BusinessPartner": "Rübennase",
            "Theme": "Life of Brian"
        },
        "sapcommunityid": `${SapCommunityId}`
    }
);
const { headers, body } = HTTP.structured(ce);

//Output
console.log(
   "Headers:", " ",
    JSON.stringify(headers, null, 2), " ",
    "Body:", " ",
    JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(body), null, 2));

const eventSender = async () => {
    try {
        const response = await axios({
            method: "post",
            url: `${SolaceProtocol}://${SolaceHost}:${SolacePort}/TOPIC/${SolaceTopic}/${SapCommunityId}/ce`,
            data: body,
            headers: {
                ...headers,
                Authorization: `Basic ${Buffer.from(`${SolaceUsername}:${SolacePassword}`).toString("base64")}`,
            },
        });
        console.log("Sending message to the topic: ", `${SolaceTopic}/${SapCommunityId}`);
        console.log("Response Status:", response.status);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error:", error);
    }
}

eventSender();
 
--------- Result ---------------------

npm run start_cloudEventAdvEveMesh
Debugger attached.

> capb2b-main@1.0.0 start_cloudEventAdvEveMesh
> node cloudEventAdvEveMesh.js

Debugger attached.
Headers:
{
"content-type": "application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8"
}
Body:
{
"id": "63d6a150-c6a1-4c5b-bcc3-27d90c07941c",
"time": "2024-02-26T10:53:06.000Z",
"type": "sap-business-One-fake",
"source": "/default/sap.s4.beh/244572008",
"specversion": "1.0",
"datacontenttype": "application/json",
"data": {
"BusinessPartner": "Rübennase",
"Theme": "Life of Brian"
},
"sapcommunityid": "MatLakaemper"
}
Sending message to the topic: dev-challenge/week-3/MatLakaemper
Response Status: 200

----- Check Message receipt ----------------------

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI to Microsoft SharePoint Adapter Integration
entry.content:
Hello hemalatha2022,

Sure. Though, to answer your question, I should tell you the specifics of my requirement.  I have setup Delegated, verses Application, authentication over Microsoft Graph.  

Authorization: https://login.microsoftonline.com/(Your Tenant GUID)/oauth2/v2.0/authorize

Token Service URL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/(Your Tenant GUID)/oauth2/v2.0/token

Scope: https://graph.microsoft.com/.default offline_access

entry.title: Poland SAP community online meetup: SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello!

Attend the meetup to learn from @pb-bp and @StephanKoenig about the role and necessity of a citizen developer as well as how to develop business process automation using the SAP Build Process Automation.

Based on a straightforward use case, we will demonstrate how to set up business processes without coding (Low Code/No Code).

We will give you resources and ideas to get you started on the path to becoming your own citizen developer.

Details here: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-stammtisch/poland-sap-community-online-meetup-sap-build-process-automation/ev-p/13631452

 

Best regards,

Przemek Miga

entry.title: How to I fix the payload not populating data on updates for withholding tax?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to fix an issue where withholding tax information is not populating correctly in the payload after initial creation.  

Internal Questionnaire being completed by employee before registration

 

ERP- Payload data

I approve the registration and the supplier is created in ECC with the withholding tax information populated correctly.

Now I want to update the withholding tax information to a different Type and Code. 

ERP- Payload data -  It is now missing fields.

It does not bring in fields 1.2 or 1.3 from above into the payload.

ECC now shows incorrectly.

Anyone have any ideas how I can fix this issue?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Generate Future dated BITs in advance from SAP CC
entry.content:
Hi,
you should activate the contract via API to trigger future dates.

You can do it via SOAP using ws Activation, and the following operation:

chargingContractActivate

https://help.sap.com/doc/d847860d561a47568a936d5f3cbeb9da/2023.1/en-US/core_wsdoc/wsdl/activation.html#chargingContractActivate 

Regards

Alessandro

entry.title: Re: External Tax Calculation Engines - How to Use Custom Sales Pricing Procedure in SAP S/4HANA Clou
entry.content:
Hi @lucas_baldo,

Thank you for sharing.

I'm currently working on a S/4HANA Cloud implementation in Brazil and I have a requirement to enhance a pricing procedure with custom condition types.

I created a pricing procedure as copy of the standard one and add the custom conditions types. Now I'm wonder how to map fields from tax engine response to the condition types.

I assumed that the mapping you explained above is not relevant for Brazil. When debbuging the return from Tax Engine, I realize SAP uses internal codes from J_1BTXCOND to map the values to the condition types.

My question is: How do I map values from External Tax response to the pricing procedure conditions? If it's by table J_1BTXCOND, how do I maintain it?

Thank you and Best Regards,

Rigo.

Thanks

entry.title: B1if can't update translation (MLT1, OMLT)
entry.content:
Hey, 
hope somebody can help me finding the  root cause of my issue. 
I am trying to update translations in SAP via B1iF. 
Adding new translations works without any problems. But as soon as I try to update them, I am getting some errors. 

If i leave the numerator value empty: 

<Payload Role="C" id="atom13" system="0010000241" status="success" b1login="Technical User" method="Synchronous Update" objectid="224" payload="atom14" keyname="TranEntry" keyvalue="58" DIresult="failure" DImsg=" Exception : DI Error: (-2035) This entry already exists in the following tables (ODBC -2035)-The di call #1 did fail."/>

If I insert a numerator: 

Exception : Input values '["58" , "58"]' does not match with expected class names '["com.sap.smb.sbo.api.ICompany" , "java.lang.Integer"]' for SBO object type '224'-The di call #1 did fail."/>

This is the input for the Call: 
<BOM>
<BO>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>224</Object>
<Version>2</Version>
</AdmInfo>
<QueryParams>
<Numerator></Numerator>
</QueryParams>
<MultiLanguageTranslations>
<row>
<TableName>OITM</TableName>
<FieldAlias>ItemName</FieldAlias>
<PrimaryKeyofobject>123456</PrimaryKeyofobject>
</row>
</MultiLanguageTranslations>
<TranslationsInUserLanguages>
<row>
<LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage>8</LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage>
<Translationscontent>New Item Translation</Translationscontent>
</row>
</TranslationsInUserLanguages>
</BO>
</BOM>

 

Many thanks in advance. 
Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hello @CathStewart, 

SAP GRC edition for SAP HANA is in development at this stage and planned for the 1st quarter of 2026. As a result, upgrade information will only be published - and Product Availability Matrix updated - when the work is finalized and the version is released. 

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: Re: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?

Thanks for your reply.

But i want to say whenever we create a catalog we get transport request to save. Wether it may be created in qs41 or qs21

If the transport request is created, then that means it has to be moved from one system to other system. That is from development to quality and quality to production.

entry.title: Re: Consume a Parameterized View from External OData v2 s...
entry.content:
Check documentation Configuring Filter Bars If some annotation is not documented there, it is probably yet to be implemented. Note that term Search is different from the term Filter. 

I configured another application for details navigation. So I did not build an object page using parameterized view.

entry.title: Re: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?
entry.content: Hi, If TR created, then you can transport from one system to another. But in case of Long Text, that you need to follow a certain step mentioned in the OSS note.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am Khalid and I have a keen interest in SAP digital skills initiative. With a proven track record in supply chain management, including a Masters degree and CSCP certification, I'm excited to expand my knowledge into the SAP world. While I lack any direct SAP experience, the Digital Skills Initiative aligns perfectly with my goals. It provides the ideal springboard to transition my skills and pursue a rewarding career as an SAP IBP analyst or consultant.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?
entry.content:
Hi Terence, 

If TR is created then it is a configuration data, not a master data na?

I'm confused.

Because the master data has to be uploaded in each system every time. Either it may be development, quality or production.

But the configuration data has to be moved through TR from dev-qa-prod. And so is the case of catalog moved like that.

Am I right?

If yes, then how can catalog be a master data

entry.title: Re: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?
entry.content: Hi Terence, If TR is created then it is a configuration data, not a master data na? I'm confused. Because the master data has to be uploaded in each system every time. Either it may be development, quality or production. But the configuration data has to be moved through TR from dev-qa-prod. And so is the case of catalog moved like that. Am I right? If yes, then how can catalog be a master data

entry.title: SAP flexible workflow step be auto approved based on the value of a field of inbound interface
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a flexible workflow which has many steps. Last step must be auto-approved when an inbound interface sends certain data about the workflow object. Is this possible to realize with Flexible workflows? We are also open to use an event instead of Inbound interface.

If not, possible with classical workflows?

Can you please share more information that how this can be made possible, in either case: Flexible/Classical workflow.

 

Many Thanks

entry.title: Re: Maintenance plan re-scheluding differences
entry.content:
Hi,

In both options, if the completion indicator is set in Maintenance Plan, then system expects both the Items Work Order to be Technically Completed.

Also, next call date will be impacted if you have maintained Shift Factors, Validity Date, Completion Requirement Check box etc.

Else, it will schedule and create the next call on the respective call date. 

The catch here is the change in frequency. When you change the Package and go to IP10, all the ON HOLD will be changed. If you change the Frequency from small to big, i dont see any impact, however, when changing from big to small, you may get orders created.

Only issue is Strategy Plans, in your scenario changing from 1M to 2M and 2M to 4M, below might be the impact

If Hierarchical Strategy, highest package only will be called. This will create only one order, even though you have two items. It will pick the highest Package item.

This is sample testing, when you suddenly change the package and you dont re-start. Some scenarios which we may not think also, can happen. 

When there is a package change, try to identify the next package and then re-start your maintenance plan.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Maintenance plan re-scheluding differences
entry.content: Hello and THANKS for clear clarification. So system will calculate new planned dates automatically based on last completion date when changing cycle / maintenance?

entry.title: Re: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?
entry.content: Hi, In older version Catalogs to be created as a Master Data in each client. SAP has provided an option this can be moved as a Transport also, which will reduce the effort you take to do the activity in each client. This depends on your system setting in SE54, if you need TR or dont need TR, its upto you to decide. Whether its Master Data or Configuration Data, this is also depends on how you take it forward and present to client. In my exp, i have both, one client this was maintained as Master Data, so they create it in each system but in another, they want to see as configuration data, so no one is allowed to change. Any change to be approved and moved to ER1

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content:
Great post, thank you. For this I was looking for. Would be nice to be able to use this out of the box in the settings (embedded) without an external tool 😉

In the past it was possible to select the showcase badges in the profile directly

I added the signature to my profile: 

<a href="https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/1611" target="_blank"><img src="https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/showcaseBadgesGroups/1611/1503/466/472/727" /></a>

But it does not show up under my posts...

entry.content: Exactly, thats right

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi Mahesh,

Thank you so much for the valuable information! It s very helpful.

I have a question - are the process steps for generating the JWT tokens different than what you demonstrated above? 
I am not clear on the difference and what exactly determines the decision which type of token we need to request - JWT or regular. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: New SAP Community - Profile Signatures
entry.content: @thomas_jung is there a way to get some badges in high quality (maybe svg)?

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @Nairpic

Thank you for reaching out. I'm glad to hear that you found the blog helpful.

The steps for generating JWT tokens differ slightly from the ones demonstrated above. Currently, you can utilize the opaque token generated from the provided steps, as JWT tokens are not yet supported in the BTP portal. However, it is expected to be available in the early first week of April. After this update, you can replace the existing token with a JWT token. You can find the steps for generating JWT tokens on the 23rd page of the PDF linked below:
OAuth Procedure for Registering Applications on the ANAF Portal


Thank you.

Mahesh Varma

entry.title: Re: Adding last Login details In standard Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

We're you able to achieve this. Need your guidance.

Regards,

Aashima

entry.title: Change TRDAT of LOGON DATA
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I want to unlock user & password reset automatically as a lot of such request come to our SAP maintenance team every day. I found useful FM for user unlock and initialize password. They work to satisfy my requirement. 

BAPI_USER_UNLOCK --> Unlock user

BAPI_USER_CHANGE --> Set initial password

However I need to update last logon date of USR02 as background job is running on our system. It is designed to check last logon date of all dialog users except system user and if user has not used SAP system over 30 days locks user. It is running on 7:00 AM everyday.

So I need to update ( set same date as sy-datum ) TRDAT after unlock & password initialized.  

As mentioned in below note changing TRDAT of USR02 seems to be prohibited & there is no FM to do it.

    "2718543 - Can the fields from USR02 table be modified?"

When user try to logon by initial password, system prompts to change password. At this point, TRDAT will be updated.  So I imagine there is possibility to update TRDAT using logon simulating FM.

Is there any idea ?

entry.title: Re: A day in the life of Mike, a Shop Floor Worker using SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Reached this blog on the way to exploring new community and found the story interesting indeed. Being from the Manufacturing background with working experience at the production shop-floor, couldn't stop reading till the end. Thanks for sharing, @ManoelCosta and keep up the good work 👏

entry.title: How to show the Product custom field on the PO printout
entry.content:
Hey gurus, 

Due to the customer's request, we've created a custom field in Product Master data, now we want this field to be displayed on the PO printout. The customer is using the S4HANA public cloud. How can we realize it? Many thanks. 

Tony

entry.title: Re: Audio stream in AppGyver Community Edition
entry.content:
Are you saying you manually created a page variable with a list of URLs (and maybe other data), and those URLs play the songs?

Are those URLs open or require authentication? Are you getting the list from an API? And can you show the actual UI that you created.

I clicked the link above and all that there was was the name of the song.

entry.title: Re: Change TRDAT of LOGON DATA
entry.content:
Don't update it, full stop. Good thing that this SAP note exists, although it is a technical restriction, I would consider that the login information should NEVER be altered by a program or another user, I consider it at the same privacy level that the password should not be known by administrators. Instead, you should review the logic of your custom program.

EDIT: why not storing the date in a custom table?

entry.title: Re: Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using SAPUI5 adaptation projects
entry.content:
Hey Elisabeth,

I have also been looking into this topic recently. Perhaps you could add what the difference is between synchronous and non-synchronous views. I think many people stumble over it.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA USING INTERNET
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently setting up a VPS with SAP HANA and SAP Business One components. Both components have public IP addresses assigned to them, and I have opened ports 40000, 40020, and 30000 for SAP B1, and ports 30015 and 30013 for the HANA server. However, when I try to connect to the SAP B1 client, I encounter an error stating "database lost." Could you please advise on which ports should be open for public access?

Arnaud.

entry.title: Re: PATCH MultiLanguageTranslations
entry.content:
I tested it in In FP2308. It is working with the following. 

PATCH https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/MultiLanguageTranslations(123)

{
    "TranslationsInUserLanguages": [
        {
            "LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage": "8",
            "Translationscontent": "Test language 1"
        },
                {
            "LanguageCodeOfUserLanguage": "9",
            "Translationscontent": "Test language 2"
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
/DMO is not completely loaded at ABAP Trial 1909. The reason is unclear. In a few weeks we support you with version 2022. /DMO is been completely loaded here.

I apologize for the inconvenience.

Ralf

entry.title: Re: Understanding and troubleshooting "Synchronous Timeout Exceeded" in SAP Process Integr
entry.content:
Hi All,

We were able to resolve the issue,  the timeout 2min 10sec was set OS level.

OS level timeout was overwriting the application timeout .

For linux server, below commands are executed to increase the timeout setting.

The default timeout for establishing TCP
connections is specified by the number of SYNC retries, set by
"net.ipv4.tcp_syn_retries" option. The default value is 6 SYNC retries,
which would provide a cumulative TCP timeout of 127 seconds. In order to
extend this timeout to 15 minutes, the net.ipv4.tcp_syn_retries setting
should be set to 9:

# sysctl -w net.ipv4.tcp_syn_retries=9
# echo "net.ipv4.tcp_syn_retries=9" >> /etc/sysctl.conf

Additionally, if your systems are hosted on Azure, then please consider 
lowering the tcp_keepalive_time to prevent Azure's load balancers from
dropping idle connections after 5 minutes:

    net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time = 120.

Also , we were suggested to use the HTTP Handler : ApacheHTTPClientSender instead of CommonsHTTPSender.

Hope it helps others.

 

Thanks

Sai

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Rate Elements limit in Subscription Billing.
entry.content:
Hi Shpresim,

general comment for everyone following the subscription billing community activities:
Always a good source for learning about the SB data model is in the Business Accelerator Hub and especially the API/event documentation:
https://api.sap.com/package/SAPHybrisRevenueCloud/rest
https://api.sap.com/package/SAPSubscriptionBillingBusinessEvents/event

Looking at your particular question, one key aspect is the assignement of rate elements to the rate plan template. The post method shows a max number of charges of 100. 

Based on my experience, everything up to around 50 charges works very well. Above there might be situations, where the calculation of the items in bills may take a bit longer due to the volume of pricing activities, that have to be executed by the system in case of changes.

Further things to notice related to your question:

  • The number of rate elements defined in business configuration is not limited. You can create as many as you want.

  • In value helps, the system only loads the first 500 entries. If there are more values defined and matching your search criteria, you need to narrow down the search criteria to make the entries showing up in the results list.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Help needed with CPI IA - MAG
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we need to create inbound DELVRY07 IDOC in S/4 from an EDI 856 (ASN) file and for that we are using Integration Adviser - MAG. MIGs are created, and initial mapping (MAG) also done. The EDI file is having multiple HL*C (Container) & HL*O (Order) and for each HL*C we need to create sperate IDOC.

Can you suggest how can we split the HL*C with HL*O and HL*I in MAG ?

entry.title: Re: Sales & Income Tax calculation on commission amounts
entry.content:
Hi @Zufliqar_Maqboo,

as you already mentioned, the first step is to maintain the different tax percentages in generic fields at the payee master record.

You can then configure different rule outputs for each result type. You could for example create 3 deposits, one with the acutal commission, one for the sales tax and one for the income tax. For the tax results you just need to multiply the commission amount with the respecitve field from the payee, that you have available in the formula editor. On deposit level you can use Earning Codes to label what kind of payment the deposit will be and Earning groups to group related deposits into one payment. 

If there are several groups of payees with the same tax percentages, you could also consider using Fixed Values and work with Variables to make individualizations on plan, title or position level.

entry.title: Mastering SAP Project Systems: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Introduction:
In the realm of enterprise resource planning (ERP) solutions, SAP stands as a titan, offering a suite of modules designed to streamline and optimize business processes. Among these modules, SAP Project Systems (PS) stands out as a cornerstone for organizations managing complex projects. In this comprehensive guide, we delve into the intricacies of SAP PS, unraveling its technical nuances and shedding light on its indispensable role in project management.

Understanding SAP Project Systems:
At its core, SAP PS is a module within the SAP ERP system tailored to support the planning, execution, and monitoring of projects. It provides robust tools for project structuring, resource allocation, cost management, and progress tracking, enabling organizations to effectively manage projects of varying scales and complexities.

Project Structuring:
One of the fundamental aspects of SAP PS is its capability to structure projects hierarchically, mirroring real-world project breakdown structures. Through Work Breakdown Structures (WBS), projects are divided into manageable components, allowing for granular control and visibility into project activities.

Resource Allocation:
Efficient resource management is crucial for project success, and SAP PS excels in this aspect. By integrating with other SAP modules such as Human Capital Management (HCM) and Materials Management (MM), PS enables organizations to allocate resources effectively, ensuring optimal utilization and minimizing resource bottlenecks.

Cost Management:
Cost control is paramount in project management, and SAP PS provides comprehensive features for cost planning, budgeting, and tracking. Project managers can define budgets at various levels of the project hierarchy, monitor actual costs in real-time, and analyze variances to ensure projects stay within budgetary constraints.

Progress Tracking:
Tracking project progress is essential for timely decision-making and course correction. SAP PS offers robust tools for progress tracking, including milestone monitoring, percentage completion tracking, and comprehensive reporting capabilities. Project stakeholders can stay informed about project status, enabling proactive management and risk mitigation.

Integration Capabilities:
SAP PS seamlessly integrates with other SAP modules and third-party systems, ensuring data consistency and facilitating end-to-end process integration. Integration with modules such as SAP Finance (FI), Controlling (CO), and Materials Management (MM) enables seamless flow of information across the enterprise, enhancing visibility and decision-making capabilities.

Conclusion:
In the ever-evolving landscape of project management, SAP Project Systems remains a cornerstone for organizations seeking to streamline their project processes, optimize resource utilization, and ensure project success. By leveraging its robust features for project structuring, resource allocation, cost management, and progress tracking, organizations can effectively manage projects of varying complexities with confidence and precision. As businesses continue to navigate the complexities of modern projects, mastering SAP PS will undoubtedly be a strategic imperative for sustainable growth and success.

entry.title: How do I display 2 different prices per Item WTQ1 - Inventory Transfer Req
entry.content: I am new to crystal reports and I need to edit the existing Inventory Transfer form showing 2 prices from 2 different pricelist in SAP Business one? One price shows the price from the pricelist indicated from the header and the other pulling from OPLN and ITM1 for the second price per item in the Inventory Transfer Request Document. tnx.

entry.title: Interim Account Update Rule
entry.content:
There are clients who want the balance of the previous year's holidays to be differentiated from the current year's holidays. To do this, we need to have a Vacation Time Account Type from the previous year.

The idea will be to close the balance of the Time Account "Vacation" at the end of the year.

 

In the Interim Account Update option in the Time Account "Previous Year's Vacation" place this rule

 

Unfortunately, this option is not yet possible to set automatically, so it will always be necessary to go to "Manage Time Off Calendars" and run the Interim Account Update

Do I miss something ?

entry.title: Need to develop logic for the “Reject” button in the Approver Inbox for Purchase Contract
entry.content:
Dear experts, we need to develop logic for the “Reject” button in the Approver Inbox for Purchase Contract. Once the approver clicks the Reject button, the workflow builder should be modified in such a way a pop-up window should appear to enter the Rejection comments and to send then to the Contract Creator.

Now, we need to capture and save this comments at Contract Header Level text as Rejection Text and display the same when sending mail notification to the Contract creator. How to achieve this?

However, for the "Workarea Analysis" template, I do not get the latest data from Manager after I refresh data in Power BI. May I know how to solve this issue? Thanks!

abp_creation_user;
abp_creation_tstmpl;
abp_locinst_lastchange_user;
abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;
abp_lastchange_tstmpl;

entry.title: Outbound Interface Custom API - Trigger point from SAP
entry.content:
Hi SAP Public Cloud Community,

We have a scenario for outbound interface where we need to create a custom Odata API in SAP system and we want to have a trigger point in SAP with which data can be pushed from SAP system to CPI.

Could anyone please let us know how can we set the trigger point in SAP system with custom Odata API.

Your response will be highly appreciated.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud OData API

entry.title: I need some advice on the correct way to create my project
entry.content:
I have a project where I have basically 4 files: An HTML file (index.html), a CSS file (styles.css) and 2 Node js files (script1.js and script2.js).

The html file is a basic page that gets populated from the code in script1.  It populates a calendar with the days of the month for the current month and gives the user the ability to change the month in a couple of different ways.

Script2 executes an HTTP GET request and from the response, populates the individual days of the month with pieces of data if it exists for that day.

I've tried this in VS  Code and keep getting CORS errors.  I created a project in Business Application Studio and get the same error.  

This is really the first time I've tried to create a Business Application Studio app other than a tutorial and I'm thinking I'm setting it up incorrectly.

So I'm searching for someone who might have some time to look at what I have and give me some suggestions on how I can improve the code and make the project work.

I can provide code, if requested.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: SAP CAL export error launching SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE appliance template
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP CAL, I get an export control error when launching the

SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE

appliance template. It happens for all templates, though I specially need the AS Java setup within this chosen template. The following error message prompt is raised after trying to accept the T&C page of the trial form:

Error

Your request is under clarification by Export Control. We will send you an email as soon as the clarification has been provided.

 

I have tried each day for four days with the same outcomes. I haven't received an emails from SAP with "clarification", which is the answer provided in other similar discussion topics. I'm trying to start the appliance from the US. I found no other support channel for the CAL which is frustrating as are trying to make our subscription purchase decision.

entry.title: CIF error - Error during CIF:Location does not exist for external location xxxx
entry.content:
Team

I'm getting error in cfm1/m2 while transferring plant and shipping points.

 

Error during CIF:Location does not exist for external location

What could be the possible reason for that?

entry.title: Re: CNMASSSTATUS. User Status are not made.
entry.content:
Transaction CNMASSSTATUS is not intended for any Status Profile changes, you have the field on selection criteria just for the purpose to identify the User Status itself. That is because the User Status exist only in the context of specific User Status Profile.

Different WBS in the same project can manage different User Status Profiles, but changing them with existing data can lead to inconsistencies in the JEST table, so do not do it without a further analysis.

entry.title: Re: Become a Paid Expert for Ask an Expert Peer program! NEW BTP Products available!

Regards,

Harazu

entry.title: Re: Multiple qualifiers in MIG and context handling
entry.content: You assigned qualifiers at the source side or the target side?

entry.title: Re: Help needed with CPI IA - MAG
entry.content: The cardinality for source to target at the top level is 1:1 which means it cannot be split unless you do something upstream.
